title: 2 Terminology
body_text:
2	Terminology
2.1	Definitions
2-Step Security
2-step security is a type of step-up authentication that芒聙聶s added to an application. To log in to an application or functionality within an application protected by 2-step security, a user must enter the one-time password from their registered 2-step security token.
2-Step Security Token
A 2-step security token is a device or application that generates a random one-time password that is recognized by applications that are protected by 2-step security.
Business User
A business user is your financial institution芒聙聶s business customer who has access to a limited set of Central 1 applications (e.g.,
PaymentStream
芒聞垄
AFT). Business Users don芒聙聶t have access to the Client Centre.
Client Centre
The Client Centre is a digital portal that provides secured access to Central 1芒聙聶s applications and to information and news about our products and services.
Client Centre Users
Client Centre Users log in to the Client Centre to access certain applications. Client Centre Users can芒聙聶t manage Security Officers (User Management / CPS Admin Security Officers) or other Client Centre Users.
CPS Admin
The Central Portal System (CPS) Admin is the legacy application used to add, edit, and delete Client Centre Users and CPS Admin Security Officers.
User Management Security Officers
User Management Security Officers (Security Officers) use the User Management or CPS Admin application to add, modify, and delete Client Centre Users and to modify and delete other User Management Security Officers in the User Management application. User Management Security Officers are also referred to as CPS Admin Security Officers. Security Officers use the Client Centre to log in to certain applications.
Hard Token
A hard token is a physical 2-step security token.
Soft Token
A soft token is a 2-step security token that芒聙聶s installed on the user芒聙聶s mobile device using a mobile app.
Step-up Authentication
A step-up authentication is any additional identity verification (e.g., using a 2-step security token) required to validate a user芒聙聶s access to a higher security level on the Client Centre and/or on CPS Admin.
User Management
User Management is an application used to add, edit, and delete Client Centre Users. It is also used to edit and delete other Security Officers and to manage 2-step security tokens.
END
